description_long: This house features a rectangular structure with exterior walls clad in a textured stone pattern, giving it a rustic yet urban appearance. Large windows dominate both gable ends, allowing ample natural light into the interior, while the side walls have smaller, symmetrically placed windows. A prominent stone staircase with metal railings leads up to a raised porch at one end, providing an elevated entryway. The roof is a simple gable style, sloping down on both sides, and the overall design is compact and functional. The house appears to be a single-story dwelling with an open, airy interior layout. The combination of stone, glass, and metal elements creates a sturdy and inviting residential structure suitable for urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story stone-clad house with large gable-end windows, a gable roof, and a raised entry porch accessed by a stone staircase. The design is compact, with a mix of large and small windows and a rustic yet modern urban feel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a wide stone staircase, metal railings, and large gable-end windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long stone wall, smaller windows, and the raised porch extending from the front.
description_view_2: Rear gable view with another set of large windows and a small balcony beneath, no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stone wall, a long horizontal window, and the staircase leading up to the porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: large gable-end windows with smaller, symmetrically placed side windows
attribute_entryway_design: Elevated entry with wide stone steps, metal railings, and a spacious porch in front of large windows
